## Meeting Purpose

[Explore FWD.digital's content marketing services for Vooma.ai's growth strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [FWD.digital offers AI-powered, editor-enhanced content creation at scale (20M words/month)](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Strategy: Become a vertical industry publisher, dominating search results for relevant topics](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Process includes research, strategy, content creation, publishing, and ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Results show significant traffic growth (e.g., 5x in 3 months) for various clients](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)

## Topics

### Vooma.ai Background

  - [Series A-stage AI platform for logistics companies](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Building AI agents for freight/trucking load lifecycle management](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Seeking aggressive growth and content strategy for the next year](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### FWD.digital's Approach

  - [AI + human editors create high-volume, quality content](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Custom knowledge base and research for each client](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Weekly meetings, reporting, and strategy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Focus on becoming "best answer" for industry questions](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [Aim: Create "optimizable surface areas" for traffic and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)

### Content Strategy and Creation Process

  - [Extensive research on company, product, ICP, and competitors](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Identify top questions, concerns, and goals of target audience](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Use AI for initial content creation, human editors for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Publish consistently, monitor performance, and optimize based on results](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

### Content Distribution and Formats

  - [Primary focus on website content as foundation](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Potential for repurposing into other formats (social, video, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Emphasis on owning the space and being comprehensive](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)

### Measuring Success

  - [Early focus: content production, indexing, and quality](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Mid-term: impressions, clicks, and click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Long-term: lead generation and conversion tracking](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)

### Engagement Details

  - [Transparent pricing, same rates for all clients](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [Current availability: First or second week of February](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
  - [Next steps: Review sample SOW, consider kickoff timing](https://fathom.video/share/y315dCQSUiwS-NU-G4tVPjRoCsfMf2CP?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

## Next Steps
